name: ada_fp32_gemm
description: Ada FP32 GEMM shape matrix for comparing native and CUTLASS-style GPU backends across realistic square and rectangular workloads.

shapes.name: square-256
shapes.note: Small square GEMM to capture launch overhead and very short-run steady state.

shapes.name: square-512
shapes.note: Mid-size square GEMM for a balanced Ada baseline comparison.

shapes.name: square-2048
shapes.note: Large square GEMM for sustained throughput and cache pressure.

shapes.name: tall-skinny-4096x1024x4096
shapes.note: Tall-skinny projection shape common in transformer feed-forward and projection paths.

shapes.name: wide-skinny-1024x4096x1024
shapes.note: Wide GEMM variant that stresses memory traffic and kernel selection differently from square shapes.
